title: Knitters Graph Paper
hero: Create knitters graph paper based on your stitch and row gauge — so what you plan on paper matches what you knit on your machine.
description:
This gauge-based graph paper adapts to your stitch and row gauge, giving you a reliable planning surface for intarsia, shaping, motifs, and custom designs.
Instead of forcing your ideas to fit generic squares, the grid reflects how your fabric actually knits — making it easier to sketch shapes, count stitches, and visualize results before you start.
excerpt: Printable knitters graph paper based on your stitch and row gauge — ideal for planning intarsia, shaping, and custom designs.
whyUseThisTool:
Generic graph paper treats every square the same — but knitted fabric doesn’t work that way.
Stitches are wider than rows are tall, and your gauge determines those proportions.

This tool creates knitters graph paper based on your stitch and row gaug
